dashboard_meta.architecture: Layer 1 agents are sealed independent raw signal producers. No cross-agent communication.

agents.summary: USD Layer 1 raw call generated from sealed independent workflow.

24h.reason: USD directional lean is bullish due to strong short-term rate rises supporting USD, but bearish signals from DXY 5-day decline and VIX risk-on conditions reduce certainty. Missing US-DE spread, Fed bias, and economic surprise inputs limit stronger conviction, as does moderate conflict between primary drivers and bearish DXY momentum.
